title: Chinas Already Extreme Housing Oversupply Becoming Even Worse 1
section_path: Chinas Already Extreme Housing Oversupply Becoming Even Worse 1
section_path_text: Chinas Already Extreme Housing Oversupply Becoming Even Worse 1
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Dry Bulk Report, February ended with 760 million square meters of floor space available in China's commercial buildings (which includes residential buildings). This marks the largest amount we have ever seen. As we have been stressing in our Weekly Dry Bulk Reports and Weekly China Reports, the last several years have continued to see an ongoing increase in new floor space in China's housing market.
